name: Broiled Chicken Oregano
recipeIngredient: 3 Tablespoons Fresh or 1 tablespoon dried oregano
3 Tablespoons Fresh or 1 tablespoon dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Several hours before serving (or the day before if time allows), rub the chicken pieces with the quartered garlic.
2. Combine the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper, and oregano in a bowl. Pour over the chicken pieces and toss to coat.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate the chicken.
4. Turn the chicken pieces occasionally while chilled.
5. When ready to cook, preheat the broiler to its highest setting.
6. Arrange the chicken pieces on the broiler rack.
7. Baste with a little of the melted butter mixture. Reserve some basting mixture for serving over the chicken.
8. Broil the chicken 3-4 inches from the heat for 5-8 minutes per side, basting often.
9. Chicken is done when juices run clear when pierced with a sharp knife.
10. Remove to a serving platter and pour the reserved basting mixture over the chicken breasts. Serve immediately. This dish is also excellent cooked on a barbecue.
